title: Kofi and the Baby Elephant
synopsis: A young boy named Kofi discovers a lost baby elephant in the savanna and helps reunite it with its family in this gentle adventure about friendship and kindness.

pages.text: Kofi loved exploring the golden grasslands near his home. The warm sun made everything glow like magic. Birds chirped happy songs in the tall grass.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing a young boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through golden savanna grass under warm sunlight, with colorful birds flying overhead in bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through sunny savanna grasslands with birds flying above

pages.text: Suddenly, Kofi heard a sad sound. "Trumpet! Trumpet!" A tiny baby elephant stood alone by a big baobab tree. The little elephant looked scared and lonely.

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene with warm savanna colors showing a small gray elephant near a large baobab tree, while a boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes approaches with concern, painted with thick brushstrokes
illustration.alt: A baby elephant standing alone by a baobab tree while Kofi approaches

pages.text: "Hello, little elephant," said Kofi gently. "Are you lost?" The baby elephant nodded with big, watery eyes. Kofi's heart felt warm. He wanted to help.

illustration.description: An expressive gouache painting showing a close-up of a boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes kneeling beside a sad baby elephant, both painted with bold confident strokes in warm orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Kofi kneeling next to the sad baby elephant, speaking gently

pages.text: Kofi took the baby elephant's trunk gently in his hand. "Don't worry," he said. "We'll find your family together." They walked through the golden grass, looking everywhere.

illustration.description: A painterly gouache scene with thick brushstrokes showing a boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes holding a baby elephant's trunk as they walk together through textured golden grass in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Kofi holding the baby elephant's trunk as they walk together through the grasslands

pages.text: They climbed a small hill and looked far across the savanna. There! A herd of big elephants was walking near the river. The baby elephant got very excited!

illustration.description: A bold gouache painting with confident strokes showing a boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes and a baby elephant on a hill, looking toward a distant herd of elephants near a river, painted in warm orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Kofi and the baby elephant on a hill spotting the elephant herd in the distance

pages.text: The baby elephant ran toward its family, trumpeting happily. Mama elephant wrapped her trunk around her baby. Kofi smiled big. He had helped a new friend find home!

illustration.description: An expressive gouache painting with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors showing a joyful reunion scene with a mother elephant hugging her baby while a boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watches happily, painted with textured painterly techniques
illustration.alt: A happy reunion as the mother elephant embraces her baby while Kofi watches with joy

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: Where did Kofi find the baby elephant?
questions.explanation: Kofi found the baby elephant standing alone by a big baobab tree.

questions.question: How did the baby elephant sound when it was lost?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant made sad trumpet sounds because it was lost and scared.

questions.question: What did Kofi hold to help the baby elephant?
questions.explanation: Kofi gently held the baby elephant's trunk in his hand as they walked together.

questions.question: Where was the elephant family when they found them?
questions.explanation: The herd of elephants was walking near the river when Kofi and the baby elephant spotted them.
